Axial religions are religions founded in the axial age. They have numerous common traits<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sk4cHR8fW-4&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=4&t=16s</ref>

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Axial religions]][[Category:Religions]]
[[sn:Axial religions]][[Category:Axial religions]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
